content.text:
Express your opinion: Do you think exercising outdoors is better than exercising indoors? Why?
表達你的想法: 你認為在戶外運動比在室內運動更好嗎？為什麼？
content.assessment_standard:
10	I believe exercising outdoors is better because it offers fresh air, natural scenery, and mental relaxation. Activities like hiking or running in the park are not only good for physical health but also for reducing stress. Being in nature makes exercise more enjoyable and motivating. It also helps people feel more connected to the environment.|Indoor exercise is better because it provides a controlled space with proper equipment and stable conditions. In the gym, I can train no matter the weather, and it's safer and more convenient. Structured workouts with machines help me stay focused on my goals. It also reduces distractions, making my training more effective.|It depends on the situation and personal preference. Some people enjoy fresh air and changing scenery, while others prefer a stable, safe indoor environment. I think both types of exercise are useful and should be chosen based on weather, time, and fitness goals. Personally, I enjoy both depending on my mood and schedule.
9	I think outdoor exercise is better because it lets me enjoy the fresh air and feel more relaxed. I like jogging in parks or going on nature trails. It also makes me feel happier and reduces stress. I enjoy the change of scenery.|I prefer indoor exercise because I can use gym equipment and don’t worry about weather. It’s easier to follow a routine and stay consistent. I feel more focused and safe indoors. It’s also good when I want to exercise alone.|I think it depends on the day or mood. If the weather is good, I like to be outside. But when it’s raining or too hot, I choose the gym. Both options are good and useful.
8	I like to run outside because it feels more free and fresh. I can see trees and people, which makes me happy. The open space helps me enjoy exercising more. It is more fun than staying inside.|I think the gym is better because it is safe and has equipment. I don’t need to worry about rain or cold. The machines help me exercise better. I can go anytime I want.|I think both are okay. Sometimes I go outside, other times I use the gym. It depends on weather and how I feel that day.
7	I enjoy outside exercise. The air is fresh, and I feel happy. I can run or walk in the park. It is better for me.|I like to exercise inside. The gym has machines. I can go even if it rains. It is more easy.|I go outside sometimes. I also go gym. It depends on the weather. Both are fine.
6	Outside is better. I run in the park. The air is good. I feel happy.|Gym is good. I can use machines. No rain inside. It is safe.|I like both. If rain, gym. If sun, outside. It changes.
5	I go run in park. Air is nice. I feel happy.|Gym is good. I use machine. No rain.|I use gym and park. Different day.
4	Run park. It feel good.|Gym better. Because no rain.|Maybe go gym. Maybe go park.
3	Park good. Run.|Gym safe.|Maybe gym and park.
2	Park.|Gym.|Don’t know.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Express your opinion: Do you prefer shopping at traditional markets or supermarkets? Why?
表達你的想法: 你比較喜歡在傳統市場還是超市購物？為什麼？
content.assessment_standard:
10	I prefer shopping at traditional markets because they offer fresh and locally grown produce at lower prices. The atmosphere is lively, and I enjoy talking to the vendors. Shopping there feels more personal and connected to the community. I also like supporting small businesses and local farmers.|I prefer shopping at supermarkets because they are clean, organized, and convenient. I can find everything I need in one place, and the products are labeled clearly with prices and expiry dates. The environment is air-conditioned and comfortable, which makes shopping easier and faster. Also, if there’s a problem, it’s easy to find somebody to ask for assistance.|My preference depends on what I need. For fresh fruits and vegetables, I go to the traditional market. However, if I’m looking for packaged goods or when I’m in a hurry, I choose the supermarket. Both have their strengths, so I switch depending on time and purpose.
9	I like traditional markets because they have fresh food and lower prices. I can talk to the vendors and ask questions. It feels more friendly and natural. I enjoy the local feeling of the market.|I like supermarkets because they are clean and easy to shop in. I can find many kinds of products in one place. It’s comfortable to walk around, and I don’t need to bargain.|It depends on what I would like to buy. I go to the market for vegetables and fruits. I use supermarkets for snacks or things in packages. It depends on the situation.
8	I prefer traditional markets because the food is fresh and cheaper. I also enjoy the local feeling and like to talk with the sellers. It feels more real.|I like supermarkets because they are cleaner and more convenient. I don’t need to worry about the weather, and I can find everything I want in one place.|I think both are useful. When I want fresh food, I go to the market. If I need many things quickly, I go to the supermarket.
7	Traditional markets are good. I like fresh food and talking to sellers. It is more fun than supermarket.|I go to supermarkets because they are clean and easy. I don’t need to talk much. It is fast.|I go to both. I buy fruits at market, and snacks at supermarket. It depends on the day.
6	I like go market. Food are fresh and cheap. I talk with people.|Supermarket clean. Many products there. I go when busy.|Sometimes market, sometimes supermarket. I change.
5	I buy food at market. It cheap and fresh. I like go.|Supermarket good. I find all things. Easy to shop.|I go both. Market for food, supermarket for other.
4	Market good. Food fresh. Cheap.|Supermarket nice. Many things. Easy.|Both okay. I go both.
3	I go market because cheap.|Store easy. More clean.|Go both. Market and store.
2	Market. Cheap.|Store. Easy.|Market, store.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question: What piece of modern 3C technology do you like to use most? Why?
回答問題: 你最喜歡使用哪種現代科技產品？為什麼？
content.assessment_standard:
10	I use my smartphone every day because it helps me stay connected and organized. I use it for texting, checking emails, listening to music, and using apps that support my studies and hobbies. It also helps me stay updated with news and events. I think it's one of the most useful tools in my daily life.|I use my laptop every day for school and free time. It helps me write reports, join online classes, and search for information. I also watch shows and play games on it when I finish studying. I really depend on it for many tasks.|I use both my phone and laptop every day. My phone is better for quick things like texting or checking news, especially when I’m in public or don’t have room for my laptop. However, for school and longer work, or when I want to see things on a larger screen, my laptop is better. I switch between them a lot, and both are important to me.
9	I use my smartphone the most. I use it every day for messages, music, and reading news. It is very helpful in my daily life. I also use it to check the weather and find places when I go outside.|I use my laptop almost every day. I use it for studying, watching videos, and doing homework. It helps me finish schoolwork and also relax. I need it for many things.|I use both my phone and laptop every day. Phone is good for talking to friends and reading. Laptop is good for school work and watching movies. I use both a lot.
8	I like using my smartphone. I use it every day to talk with friends, watch videos, and check news. It helps me do many things easily.|I often use my laptop for schoolwork. I also watch movies and search online. I use it many times during the week.|I use both phone and laptop. The phone is good for fun and messages. The laptop is good for school. I use both a lot.
7	I use my phone every day. I talk to friends and watch videos. It is easy and fun to use.|I use my laptop at night for school. I do homework and watch movies. It helps me study.|I use phone and laptop. Phone is for chat and games. Laptop is for study and shows. I like both.
6	I use my phone. I watch videos and talk with friends. I use it every day.|I use laptop for school. I do homework and watch movies. It is helpful.|I use both. Phone is fun. Laptop is school.
5	Phone are good. I talk and watch. Use every day.|Laptop is good. I do homework. Watch video.|I use phone and laptop. Phone fun. Laptop for class.
4	Use phone. Watch movie, call friend.|Laptop help. Watch movie, go class.|Phone and laptop. Use both every day.
3	Phone good for watch..|Laptop help. School work.|Use phone, laptop, both good.
2	Phone good.|Need laptop, school.|Both.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question: Talk about a time when you had a problem with technology.
回答問題: 分享你曾經遇到的科技問題。
content.assessment_standard:
10	One time, I had an important online exam, and right before it started, my internet connection suddenly stopped working. I panicked but quickly used my mobile hotspot to reconnect. Luckily, I contacted my teacher and was allowed to rejoin the exam. This situation taught me to always have a backup plan when using technology for important tasks.|Last semester, my laptop crashed while I was finishing a final report. I hadn’t saved the latest version, so I lost a lot of work. I had to rewrite everything late into the night. After that, I always save my files to the cloud. It was a tough but important lesson.|Once, I had trouble joining a Zoom job interview because the app wouldn’t open. I quickly restarted my computer and used my phone instead. The delay made me nervous, but I explained the problem, and the interviewer understood. It reminded me to check tech tools in advance.
9	I had a problem during an online class when my laptop froze. I couldn’t hear the teacher, and my screen turned black. I had to restart the laptop, and I missed some parts of the lesson. It was stressful, but I learned to check my laptop before class.|Once my laptop crashed when I was working on a report. I lost my file because I didn’t save. I had to write it again that night. Now I save my work online.|Before a job interview, my Zoom app didn’t work. I restarted my laptop, but it was slow. So I joined from my phone. The interview still went okay.
8	My phone stopped working when I was traveling. I couldn’t use the map, and I didn’t know where to go. I had to ask people on the street. It was hard but also helpful.|My laptop crashed before I finished a report. I didn’t save, so I lost my work. I stayed up to write again. Now I save online.|I had an interview, but Zoom didn’t work on my computer. I restarted it but still had to use my phone. I still had the interview.
7	My laptop had a problem. It stopped in class. I turned it off and on, and it worked. But I missed some class.|Laptop died when I write report. I lost my report. I wrote again.|Zoom app not open. I restart the laptop, but it didn’t work. Then I used my phone to join the meeting.
6	Laptop stop in class. I turn off and on. Missed part of class.|I write report. Laptop crash. File gone. Write again.|Zoom A.P.P. not open. So, need use phone. Enjoy meeting.
5	Laptop stop work. I restart but miss some class.|Report gone. Laptop crash so have to write again.|Zoom not work. Use phone for meet.
4	Laptop stop. Restart. Miss class.|Laptop crash. Homework gone. Write again.|Zoom bad. Use phone, it okay.
3	Laptop crash in class.|Homework gone. Write again.|Zoom no. Use phone.
2	Laptop die.|Lose homework.|No Zoom.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question: What do you think of video and computer games? Are they a waste of time?
回答問題: 你對影片遊戲和電腦遊戲有什麼看法？你認為玩遊戲很浪費時間嗎？
content.assessment_standard:
10	I believe video and computer games can be a waste of time if people play them excessively without any self-control. Some students spend hours gaming and forget about their responsibilities, like studying or exercising. While games can be entertaining, they often offer little long-term value. If not balanced with real-life activities, they can harm productivity and social life.|I don't think video and computer games are a waste of time. Many games improve problem-solving skills and hand-eye coordination. Some games are educational and can even teach history or language. Also, playing games can help people relax and connect with others online. Like any hobby, it’s fine if done in moderation.|In my opinion, it depends on how and why people play video games. If someone plays all day and ignores their work or health, then it’s not just a waste of time, it’s bad for them. However, if they play to relax after finishing their tasks, it can be a fun and harmless break, or can even help their mental well-being. So, it really depends on the person’s habits.
9	Video games can be a waste of time if people play too much. Some students play for hours and don’t study. It’s bad for health and school performance. They just sit and play, and that’s not helpful.|I don’t think video games are a waste. Some games help with thinking and fast reactions. They also help people relax. If people play after work or school, it’s not bad.|It depends on the person. If they play too long, it’s bad. But if they play only a little after finishing their work, it’s okay. It can be fun and relaxing if you don’t do it too much.
8	I think games are a waste when people play too much. They don’t study and it’s bad. It’s not good for health too.|Games are fun and help people relax. Some games are good for learning and thinking. I play games after homework.|Sometimes games are okay. But if people play too long, it’s not good. It depends on how they use the time.
7	Games waste time. People play all day and not study. It’s bad for students.|Games are fun. I play after school. It helps me relax.|Games okay sometimes, if not too much. But too much is not good.
6	Game not good. People play long time. No study.|Game fun. Help relax. Good for free time.|Game sometimes okay. But not too long.
5	Game bad. Play too long. No do homework.|Game nice. I like. Play after school.|Game fun, but too much bad.
4	Game long time. No good. No study.|Game fun. I like play.|Game okay. Not always good.
3	Game bad. No study.|Game fun, no problem.|Sometimes okay. Sometimes bad.
2	Bad.|Like game.|Okay?
1	(No response / Silence)
